payload.description:
## Summary
Build the workflow runner/orchestrator that executes the staged optimization protocol and records the resulting assessment bundle.

## Deliverables
- Execute deterministic and random evaluation stages in the defined order.
- Capture the evaluation IDs involved in one candidate assessment bundle.
- Record the combined result and workflow decision in a standardized way for operators and future agents.
payload.title: Build staged optimization runner and assessment-bundle recording workflow
